name: putnam_1977_a2
proposed_answer: fun a b c d : ℝ => a + b + c = d ∧ (a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0)
assembled_proof:
import Mathlib
theorem putnam_1977_a2 : ∃ (putnam_1977_a2_solution : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ → ℝ → Prop), (∀ (a b c d : ℝ), a ≠ (0 : ℝ) → b ≠ (0 : ℝ) → c ≠ (0 : ℝ) → d ≠ (0 : ℝ) → (putnam_1977_a2_solution a b c d ↔ a + b + c = d ∧ (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d)) := by
  use (fun a b c d : ℝ => a + b + c = d ∧ (a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0) : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ → ℝ → Prop)
  intro a b c d ha hb hc hd
  have h₁ : ((fun a b c d : ℝ => a + b + c = d ∧ (a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0)) a b c d ↔ a + b + c = d ∧ (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d) := by
    dsimp only
    constructor
    · 
      intro h
      have h₂ : a + b + c = d := h.1
      have h₃ : a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0 := h.2
      have h₄ : a + b + c ≠ 0 := by
        intro h₄
        apply hd
        linarith
      have h₅ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := by

        rcases h₃ with (h₃ | h₃ | h₃)
        · 
          have h₆ : b = -a := by linarith
          have h₇ : d = c := by linarith
          rw [h₇]
          have h₈ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / c := by
            rw [h₆]
            field_simp [ha, hb, hc]
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> field_simp [ha, hb, hc]
            <;> ring_nf
          rw [h₈]
          <;> field_simp [ha, hb, hc]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp [ha, hb, hc]
          <;> ring_nf
        · 
          have h₆ : c = -b := by linarith
          have h₇ : d = a := by linarith
          rw [h₇]
          have h₈ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / a := by
            rw [h₆]
            field_simp [ha, hb, hc]
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> field_simp [ha, hb, hc]
            <;> ring_nf
          rw [h₈]
          <;> field_simp [ha, hb, hc]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp [ha, hb, hc]
          <;> ring_nf
        · 
          have h₆ : a = -c := by linarith
          have h₇ : d = b := by linarith
          rw [h₇]
          have h₈ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / b := by
            rw [h₆]
            field_simp [ha, hb, hc]
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> field_simp [ha, hb, hc]
            <;> ring_nf
          rw [h₈]
          <;> field_simp [ha, hb, hc]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp [ha, hb, hc]
          <;> ring_nf
      exact ⟨h₂, h₅⟩
    · 
      intro h
      have h₂ : a + b + c = d := h.1
      have h₃ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h.2
      have h₄ : a + b + c ≠ 0 := by
        intro h₄
        apply hd
        linarith
      have h₅ : a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0 := by
        have h₅₁ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₂ : a + b + c = d := h₂
        have h₅₃ : d ≠ 0 := hd
        have h₅₄ : a ≠ 0 := ha
        have h₅₅ : b ≠ 0 := hb
        have h₅₆ : c ≠ 0 := hc
        have h₅₇ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₈ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₉ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₁₀ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₁₁ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₁₂ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₁₃ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₁₄ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₁₅ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₁₆ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₁₇ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₁₈ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₁₉ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₂₀ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₂₁ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₂₂ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₂₃ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₂₄ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₂₅ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₂₆ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₂₇ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₂₈ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₂₉ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
        have h₅₃₀ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃

        have h₅₃₁ : (a + b) * (b + c) * (c + a) = 0 := by
          have h₅₃₂ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
          have h₅₃₃ : a + b + c = d := h₂
          have h₅₃₄ : d ≠ 0 := hd
          have h₅₃₅ : a ≠ 0 := ha
          have h₅₃₆ : b ≠ 0 := hb
          have h₅₃₇ : c ≠ 0 := hc
          have h₅₃₈ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
          have h₅₃₉ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
          have h₅₄₀ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
          have h₅₄₁ : (1 : ℝ) / a + (1 : ℝ) / b + (1 : ℝ) / c = (1 : ℝ) / d := h₃
          field_simp [ha, hb, hc, hd] at h₅₃₂ h₅₃₈ h₅₄₀ h₅₄₁ ⊢
          ring_nf at h₅₃₂ h₅₃₈ h₅₄₀ h₅₄₁ ⊢
          nlinarith [sq_pos_of_ne_zero ha, sq_pos_of_ne_zero hb, sq_pos_of_ne_zero hc,
            sq_pos_of_ne_zero hd, sq_nonneg (a + b + c), sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c),
            sq_nonneg (c - a)]
        have h₅₄₂ : (a + b) * (b + c) * (c + a) = 0 := h₅₃₁
        have h₅₄₃ : a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0 := by
          have h₅₄₄ : (a + b) * (b + c) * (c + a) = 0 := h₅₄₂
          have h₅₄₅ : a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0 := by
            by_cases h₅₄₆ : a + b = 0
            · exact Or.inl h₅₄₆
            · by_cases h₅₄₇ : b + c = 0
              · exact Or.inr (Or.inl h₅₄₇)
              · have h₅₄₈ : c + a = 0 := by
                  apply mul_left_cancel₀ (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₅₄₆)
                  apply mul_left_cancel₀ (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₅₄₇)
                  nlinarith
                exact Or.inr (Or.inr h₅₄₈)
          exact h₅₄₅
        exact h₅₄₃
      exact ⟨h₂, h₅⟩
  exact h₁

name: putnam_1977_a3
assembled_proof:
import Mathlib
theorem putnam_1977_a3 : ∃ (putnam_1977_a3_solution : (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ)), ∀ (f g h : ℝ → ℝ), ((∀ (x : ℝ), f x = (h (x + (1 : ℝ)) + h (x - (1 : ℝ))) / (2 : ℝ)) ∧ (∀ (x : ℝ), g x = (h (x + (4 : ℝ)) + h (x - (4 : ℝ))) / (2 : ℝ))) → (h = putnam_1977_a3_solution f g) := by
  use (fun f g x => g x + f (x + (1 : ℝ)) + f (x - (1 : ℝ)) - f (x + (3 : ℝ)) - f (x - (3 : ℝ)) : (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ))
  intro f g h h_hyp
  have h_main : ∀ (x : ℝ), h x = g x + f (x + 1) + f (x - 1) - f (x + 3) - f (x - 3) := by
    intro x
    have h1 : f (x + 1) = (h ((x + 1) + 1) + h ((x + 1) - 1)) / 2 := by
      have h1 := h_hyp.1 (x + 1)
      ring_nf at h1 ⊢
      linarith
    have h2 : f (x - 1) = (h ((x - 1) + 1) + h ((x - 1) - 1)) / 2 := by
      have h2 := h_hyp.1 (x - 1)
      ring_nf at h2 ⊢
      linarith
    have h3 : f (x + 3) = (h ((x + 3) + 1) + h ((x + 3) - 1)) / 2 := by
      have h3 := h_hyp.1 (x + 3)
      ring_nf at h3 ⊢
      linarith
    have h4 : f (x - 3) = (h ((x - 3) + 1) + h ((x - 3) - 1)) / 2 := by
      have h4 := h_hyp.1 (x - 3)
      ring_nf at h4 ⊢
      linarith
    have h5 : g x = (h (x + 4) + h (x - 4)) / 2 := by
      have h5 := h_hyp.2 x
      ring_nf at h5 ⊢
      linarith

    have h6 : g x + f (x + 1) + f (x - 1) - f (x + 3) - f (x - 3) = h x := by
      rw [h1, h2, h3, h4, h5]
      ring_nf
      <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try field_simp) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try linarith)
    linarith

  have h_final : h = (fun f g x => g x + f (x + (1 : ℝ)) + f (x - (1 : ℝ)) - f (x + (3 : ℝ)) - f (x - (3 : ℝ)) : (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ)) f g := by
    funext x
    rw [h_main x]
    <;>
    simp_all [Function.funext_iff]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    linarith

  exact h_final

name: putnam_1986_a1
assembled_proof:
import Mathlib
theorem putnam_1986_a1 : ∃ (putnam_1986_a1_solution : ℝ), ∀ (S : Set ℝ), ∀ (f : ℝ → ℝ), ((S = {x : ℝ | x ^ (4 : ℕ) + (36 : ℝ) ≤ (13 : ℝ) * x ^ (2 : ℕ)}) ∧ (f = fun (x : ℝ) => x ^ (3 : ℕ) - (3 : ℝ) * x)) → (IsGreatest {x : ℝ | ∃ x_1 ∈ S, f x_1 = x} putnam_1986_a1_solution) := by
  use ((18 : ℝ) : ℝ)
  intro S f hf
  have h₁ : S = {x : ℝ | x ^ (4 : ℕ) + (36 : ℝ) ≤ (13 : ℝ) * x ^ (2 : ℕ)} := by
    exact hf.1

  have h₂ : f = fun (x : ℝ) => x ^ (3 : ℕ) - (3 : ℝ) * x := by
    exact hf.2

  have h₃ : IsGreatest {x : ℝ | ∃ x_1 ∈ S, f x_1 = x} ((18 : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
    rw [h₂]
    rw [h₁]
    constructor
    · 
      use 3
      constructor
      · 
        norm_num [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      · 
        norm_num
    · 
      intro x hx
      rcases hx with ⟨x₁, hx₁, hx₂⟩
      have h₄ : x₁ ^ (4 : ℕ) + (36 : ℝ) ≤ (13 : ℝ) * x₁ ^ (2 : ℕ) := by simpa using hx₁
      have h₅ : (fun x => x ^ (3 : ℕ) - (3 : ℝ) * x) x₁ = x := by simpa using hx₂
      have h₆ : x ≤ (18 : ℝ) := by
        norm_num at h₅ ⊢
        ring_nf at h₅ ⊢

        have h₇ : x₁ ≥ -3 := by
          by_contra h
          have h₈ : x₁ < -3 := by linarith
          have h₉ : x₁ ^ (4 : ℕ) + (36 : ℝ) > (13 : ℝ) * x₁ ^ (2 : ℕ) := by
            norm_num at h₈ ⊢
            nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 9), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 4)]
          linarith
        have h₈ : x₁ ≤ -2 ∨ x₁ ≥ 2 := by
          by_cases h₉ : x₁ ≥ 2
          · exact Or.inr h₉
          · have h₁₀ : x₁ ≤ -2 := by
              by_contra h₁₀
              have h₁₁ : x₁ > -2 := by linarith
              have h₁₂ : x₁ ^ (4 : ℕ) + (36 : ℝ) > (13 : ℝ) * x₁ ^ (2 : ℕ) := by
                norm_num at h₁₁ ⊢
                nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 9), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 4)]
              linarith
            exact Or.inl h₁₀
        cases h₈ with
        | inl h₈ =>

          have h₉ : x₁ ≤ -2 := h₈
          have h₁₀ : x ≤ (18 : ℝ) := by
            nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 9), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 4),
              sq_nonneg (x₁ + 3), sq_nonneg (x₁ + 2), sq_nonneg (x₁ - 3),
              sq_nonneg (x₁ - 2)]
          exact h₁₀
        | inr h₈ =>

          have h₉ : x₁ ≥ 2 := h₈
          have h₁₀ : x ≤ (18 : ℝ) := by
            nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 9), sq_nonneg (x₁ ^ 2 - 4),
              sq_nonneg (x₁ + 3), sq_nonneg (x₁ + 2), sq_nonneg (x₁ - 3),
              sq_nonneg (x₁ - 2)]
          exact h₁₀
      exact h₆
  exact h₃

name: putnam_1986_b1
assembled_proof:
import Mathlib
open  Real Equiv
theorem putnam_1986_b1 : ∃ (putnam_1986_b1_solution : ℝ), ∀ (b h : ℝ), ((b > (0 : ℝ) ∧ h > (0 : ℝ) ∧ b ^ (2 : ℕ) + h ^ (2 : ℕ) = (2 : ℝ) ^ (2 : ℕ)) ∧ (b * h = 0.5 * b * ((1 : ℝ) - h / (2 : ℝ)))) → (h = putnam_1986_b1_solution) := by
  use ((2 : ℝ) / 5 : ℝ)
  intro b h h₀
  have h₁ : h = (2 : ℝ) / 5 := by
    have h₂ : b > 0 := h₀.1.1
    have h₃ : h > 0 := h₀.1.2.1
    have h₄ : b ^ 2 + h ^ 2 = 4 := by
      norm_num [pow_two] at h₀ ⊢
      <;>
      (try norm_num at h₀ ⊢) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try nlinarith) <;>
      (try ring_nf at h₀ ⊢) <;>
      (try nlinarith)
      <;>
      (try linarith)
      <;>
      (try nlinarith)
    have h₅ : b * h = 0.5 * b * (1 - h / 2) := by
      norm_num at h₀ ⊢
      <;>
      (try ring_nf at h₀ ⊢) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try nlinarith)
      <;>
      (try ring_nf at h₀ ⊢) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try nlinarith)
      <;>
      (try ring_nf at h₀ ⊢) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try nlinarith)
      <;>
      (try ring_nf at h₀ ⊢) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try nlinarith)
      <;>
      (try ring_nf at h₀ ⊢) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try nlinarith)
      <;>
      (try ring_nf at h₀ ⊢) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try nlinarith)
    have h₆ : 2 * b * h = b * (1 - h / 2) := by
      norm_num at h₅ ⊢
      <;>
      ring_nf at h₅ ⊢ <;>
      nlinarith
    have h₇ : 2 * h = 1 - h / 2 := by
      apply mul_left_cancel₀ (show (b : ℝ) ≠ 0 by linarith)
      nlinarith
    have h₈ : 4 * h = 2 - h := by
      nlinarith
    have h₉ : 5 * h = 2 := by
      nlinarith
    have h₁₀ : h = (2 : ℝ) / 5 := by
      nlinarith
    exact h₁₀
  exact h₁

name: putnam_1988_b2
assembled_proof:
import Mathlib
open Set Filter Topology
theorem putnam_1988_b2 : ∃ (putnam_1988_b2_solution : Prop), ((∀ (x y : ℝ), y ≥ (0 : ℝ) ∧ y * (y + (1 : ℝ)) ≤ (x + (1 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) → y * (y - (1 : ℝ)) ≤ x ^ (2 : ℕ)) ↔ putnam_1988_b2_solution) := by
  use (True : Prop)
  have h_main : (∀ (x y : ℝ), y ≥ (0 : ℝ) ∧ y * (y + (1 : ℝ)) ≤ (x + (1 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) → y * (y - (1 : ℝ)) ≤ x ^ (2 : ℕ)) ↔ True := by
    constructor
    · 
      intro h
      trivial
    · 
      intro h
      intro x y h₁
      have h₂ : y ≥ (0 : ℝ) := h₁.1
      have h₃ : y * (y + (1 : ℝ)) ≤ (x + (1 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) := h₁.2

      have h₄ : y * (y - (1 : ℝ)) ≤ x ^ (2 : ℕ) := by
        norm_num at h₃ ⊢
        cases' le_total y 1 with hy hy <;>
          cases' le_total x (-1 + Real.sqrt 2) with hx hx <;>
          cases' le_total x (-1 - Real.sqrt 2) with hx' hx' <;>
          simp_all [sq, mul_comm] <;>
          (try norm_num at * <;> nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 by norm_num)]) <;>
          (try
            {
              nlinarith [sq_nonneg (y - 1), sq_nonneg (y + 1), sq_nonneg (x + 1),
                sq_nonneg (x - (-1 + Real.sqrt 2)), sq_nonneg (x - (-1 - Real.sqrt 2)),
                Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 by norm_num)]
            }) <;>
          (try
            {
              cases' le_total y 1 with hy hy <;>
              cases' le_total x (-1 + Real.sqrt 2) with hx hx <;>
              cases' le_total x (-1 - Real.sqrt 2) with hx' hx' <;>
              simp_all [sq, mul_comm] <;>
              (try norm_num at * <;> nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 by norm_num)]) <;>
              (try nlinarith [sq_nonneg (y - 1), sq_nonneg (y + 1), sq_nonneg (x + 1),
                sq_nonneg (x - (-1 + Real.sqrt 2)), sq_nonneg (x - (-1 - Real.sqrt 2)),
                Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 by norm_num)])
            }) <;>
          (try
            {
              nlinarith [sq_nonneg (y - 1), sq_nonneg (y + 1), sq_nonneg (x + 1),
                sq_nonneg (x - (-1 + Real.sqrt 2)), sq_nonneg (x - (-1 - Real.sqrt 2)),
                Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 by norm_num)]
            }) <;>
          (try
            {
              cases' le_total y 1 with hy hy <;>
              cases' le_total x (-1 + Real.sqrt 2) with hx hx <;>
              cases' le_total x (-1 - Real.sqrt 2) with hx' hx' <;>
              simp_all [sq, mul_comm] <;>
              (try norm_num at * <;> nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 by norm_num)]) <;>
              (try nlinarith [sq_nonneg (y - 1), sq_nonneg (y + 1), sq_nonneg (x + 1),
                sq_nonneg (x - (-1 + Real.sqrt 2)), sq_nonneg (x - (-1 - Real.sqrt 2)),
                Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 by norm_num)])
            })
      exact h₄
  exact h_main

name: putnam_1990_a1
proposed_answer: (fun n : ℕ => (2 : ℤ) ^ n, fun n : ℕ => n.factorial)
assembled_proof:
import Mathlib
open Filter Topology Nat
theorem putnam_1990_a1 : ∃ (putnam_1990_a1_solution : (ℕ → ℤ) × (ℕ → ℤ)), ∀ (T : ℕ → ℤ), ((T (0 : ℕ) = (2 : ℤ) ∧ T (1 : ℕ) = (3 : ℤ) ∧ T (2 : ℕ) = (6 : ℤ)) ∧ (∀ (n : ℕ), T (n + (3 : ℕ)) = ((↑n : ℤ) + (7 : ℤ)) * T (n + (2 : ℕ)) - (4 : ℤ) * ((↑n : ℤ) + (3 : ℤ)) * T (n + (1 : ℕ)) + ((4 : ℤ) * (↑n : ℤ) + (4 : ℤ)) * T n)) → (T = putnam_1990_a1_solution.1 + putnam_1990_a1_solution.2) := by

name: putnam_2005_b1
proposed_answer: (MvPolynomial.X (1 : Fin 2) - MvPolynomial.C (2 : ℝ) * MvPolynomial.X (0 : Fin 2)) * (MvPolynomial.X (1 : Fin 2) - MvPolynomial.C (2 : ℝ) * MvPolynomial.X (0 : Fin 2) - 1)
assembled_proof:
import Mathlib
open Nat Set
theorem putnam_2005_b1 : ∃ (putnam_2005_b1_solution : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) ℝ), (putnam_2005_b1_solution ≠ (0 : MvPolynomial (Fin (2 : ℕ)) ℝ) ∧ ∀ (a : ℝ), (MvPolynomial.eval fun (n : Fin (2 : ℕ)) => if n = (0 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) then (↑⌊a⌋ : ℝ) else (↑⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℝ) : MvPolynomial (Fin (2 : ℕ)) ℝ → ℝ) putnam_2005_b1_solution = (0 : ℝ)) := by
  use ((MvPolynomial.X (1 : Fin 2) - MvPolynomial.C (2 : ℝ) * MvPolynomial.X (0 : Fin 2)) * (MvPolynomial.X (1 : Fin 2) - MvPolynomial.C (2 : ℝ) * MvPolynomial.X (0 : Fin 2) - 1) : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) ℝ)
  have h₁ : ((MvPolynomial.X (1 : Fin 2) - MvPolynomial.C (2 : ℝ) * MvPolynomial.X (0 : Fin 2)) * (MvPolynomial.X (1 : Fin 2) - MvPolynomial.C (2 : ℝ) * MvPolynomial.X (0 : Fin 2) - 1) : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) ℝ) ≠ (0 : MvPolynomial (Fin (2 : ℕ)) ℝ) := by
    intro h
    have h₂ := congr_arg (fun p => MvPolynomial.eval (fun n => if n = 0 then (1 : ℝ) else (0 : ℝ)) p) h
    simp [MvPolynomial.eval_mul, MvPolynomial.eval_sub, MvPolynomial.eval_add, MvPolynomial.eval_pow,
      MvPolynomial.eval_C, MvPolynomial.eval_X, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one] at h₂
    <;> norm_num at h₂ <;>
    (try contradiction) <;>
    (try linarith) <;>
    (try ring_nf at h₂ ⊢) <;>
    (try norm_num at h₂ ⊢) <;>
    (try linarith)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [MvPolynomial.eval_mul, MvPolynomial.eval_sub, MvPolynomial.eval_add, MvPolynomial.eval_pow,
          MvPolynomial.eval_C, MvPolynomial.eval_X, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one]
        <;> norm_num <;> linarith
      })

  have h₂ : ∀ (a : ℝ), (MvPolynomial.eval fun (n : Fin (2 : ℕ)) => if n = (0 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) then (↑⌊a⌋ : ℝ) else (↑⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℝ) : MvPolynomial (Fin (2 : ℕ)) ℝ → ℝ) ((MvPolynomial.X (1 : Fin 2) - MvPolynomial.C (2 : ℝ) * MvPolynomial.X (0 : Fin 2)) * (MvPolynomial.X (1 : Fin 2) - MvPolynomial.C (2 : ℝ) * MvPolynomial.X (0 : Fin 2) - 1) : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) ℝ) = (0 : ℝ) := by
    intro a
    have h₃ : (MvPolynomial.eval fun (n : Fin (2 : ℕ)) => if n = (0 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) then (↑⌊a⌋ : ℝ) else (↑⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℝ) : MvPolynomial (Fin (2 : ℕ)) ℝ → ℝ) ((MvPolynomial.X (1 : Fin 2) - MvPolynomial.C (2 : ℝ) * MvPolynomial.X (0 : Fin 2)) * (MvPolynomial.X (1 : Fin 2) - MvPolynomial.C (2 : ℝ) * MvPolynomial.X (0 : Fin 2) - 1) : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) ℝ) = (0 : ℝ) := by

      have h₄ : (MvPolynomial.eval fun (n : Fin (2 : ℕ)) => if n = (0 : Fin (2 : ℕ)) then (↑⌊a⌋ : ℝ) else (↑⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℝ) : MvPolynomial (Fin (2 : ℕ)) ℝ → ℝ) ((MvPolynomial.X (1 : Fin 2) - MvPolynomial.C (2 : ℝ) * MvPolynomial.X (0 : Fin 2)) * (MvPolynomial.X (1 : Fin 2) - MvPolynomial.C (2 : ℝ) * MvPolynomial.X (0 : Fin 2) - 1) : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) ℝ) = (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ - 2 * ⌊a⌋) * (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ - 2 * ⌊a⌋ - 1) := by

        simp [MvPolynomial.eval_mul, MvPolynomial.eval_sub, MvPolynomial.eval_add, MvPolynomial.eval_pow,
          MvPolynomial.eval_C, MvPolynomial.eval_X, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one]
        <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try field_simp) <;>
        (try norm_cast) <;>
        (try simp_all [Int.floor_eq_iff, Int.ceil_eq_iff, Int.fract_eq_iff]) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try field_simp) <;>
        (try norm_cast) <;>
        (try simp_all [Int.floor_eq_iff, Int.ceil_eq_iff, Int.fract_eq_iff]) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith)
        <;>
        (try
          {
            cases' le_or_lt 0 (⌊a⌋ : ℝ) with h₅ h₅ <;>
            cases' le_or_lt 0 (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℝ) with h₆ h₆ <;>
            simp_all [Int.floor_eq_iff, Int.ceil_eq_iff, Int.fract_eq_iff] <;>
            norm_num <;>
            linarith
          })
      rw [h₄]

      have h₅ : ⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ = 2 * ⌊a⌋ ∨ ⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ = 2 * ⌊a⌋ + 1 := by
        have h₅₁ : (2 : ℝ) * a - 1 < ⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ := by
          apply Int.sub_one_lt_floor
        have h₅₂ : (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℝ) ≤ (2 : ℝ) * a := by
          exact Int.floor_le ((2 : ℝ) * a)
        have h₅₃ : (⌊a⌋ : ℝ) ≤ a := by
          exact Int.floor_le a
        have h₅₄ : a < (⌊a⌋ : ℝ) + 1 := by
          exact Int.lt_floor_add_one a
        have h₅₅ : (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) = 2 * ⌊a⌋ ∨ (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) = 2 * ⌊a⌋ + 1 := by
          have h₅₅₁ : (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) = 2 * ⌊a⌋ ∨ (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) = 2 * ⌊a⌋ + 1 := by

            have h₅₅₂ : (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) ≥ 2 * ⌊a⌋ := by

              have h₅₅₃ : (⌊a⌋ : ℝ) ≤ a := Int.floor_le a
              have h₅₅₄ : a < (⌊a⌋ : ℝ) + 1 := Int.lt_floor_add_one a
              have h₅₅₅ : (2 : ℝ) * (⌊a⌋ : ℝ) ≤ (2 : ℝ) * a := by linarith
              have h₅₅₆ : (2 : ℝ) * a < (2 : ℝ) * ((⌊a⌋ : ℝ) + 1) := by linarith
              have h₅₅₇ : (2 * ⌊a⌋ : ℤ) ≤ ⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ := by
                apply Int.le_floor.mpr
                norm_num at h₅₅₅ h₅₅₆ ⊢
                <;>
                (try norm_num) <;>
                (try linarith)
              exact_mod_cast h₅₅₇
            have h₅₅₈ : (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) < 2 * ⌊a⌋ + 2 := by

              have h₅₅₉ : a < (⌊a⌋ : ℝ) + 1 := Int.lt_floor_add_one a
              have h₅₅₁₀ : (2 : ℝ) * a < (2 : ℝ) * ((⌊a⌋ : ℝ) + 1) := by linarith
              have h₅₅₁₁ : (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) < 2 * ⌊a⌋ + 2 := by
                apply Int.floor_lt.mpr
                norm_num at h₅₅₁₀ ⊢
                <;>
                (try norm_num) <;>
                (try linarith)
              exact_mod_cast h₅₅₁₁

            have h₅₅₁₂ : (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) = 2 * ⌊a⌋ ∨ (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) = 2 * ⌊a⌋ + 1 := by
              omega
            exact h₅₅₁₂
          exact h₅₅₁
        cases h₅₅ with
        | inl h₅₅ =>
          have h₅₆ : (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) = 2 * ⌊a⌋ := h₅₅
          have h₅₇ : (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) = 2 * ⌊a⌋ := h₅₅
          have h₅₈ : (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) = 2 * ⌊a⌋ := h₅₅
          simp_all [Int.cast_add, Int.cast_mul, Int.cast_ofNat]
          <;>
          norm_num at *
          <;>

        | inr h₅₅ =>
          have h₅₆ : (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) = 2 * ⌊a⌋ + 1 := h₅₅
          have h₅₇ : (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) = 2 * ⌊a⌋ + 1 := h₅₅
          have h₅₈ : (⌊(2 : ℝ) * a⌋ : ℤ) = 2 * ⌊a⌋ + 1 := h₅₅

        <;> ring_nf
